Explanation:
The goal scored in Saint Petersburg, Russia is listed as goal 3 (2011-06-04 vs Russia). After that, the table shows four subsequent goals: goal 4 (2011-09-02 vs Andorra), goal 5 (2011-10-07 vs Macedonia), goal 6 (2012-02-29 vs Canada), and goal 7 (2012-02-29 vs Canada). Therefore, Marcos Pizzelli scored 4 goals after the Saint Petersburg goal.
